stories.name: Julius
stories.quote: I got my Boxer in 2 hours. 14 months later I owned it. My daily take-home is now 3× what it was.

stories.name: Mary
stories.quote: The buyoff saved me KES 8,400 every month. Same car, same logbook — just lower payments.

stories.name: Elijah
stories.quote: My tuk-tuk logbook funds my parts inventory. Next week I'm financing my second vehicle.
